UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: CRITICAL: Do NOT modify, remove, or change ANY `data-testid` attributes.
Do NOT introduce new CSS files. Use Tailwind utility classes and inline styles ONLY.
Ensure `tabular-nums` is applied to all metric values and numbers to prevent layout shifting during updates.
Preserve existing Shadcn UI structure; simply inject these design classes via the `className` prop.
Legacy '.glow-yellow' class usage MUST be styled with violet palette utility classes instead (e.g. shadow-violet-500, border-violet-500).
Focus heavily on subtle elevation (`-translate-y-0.5`) and ambient shadows (`shadow-[...]`) on hover to create the tactile Linear/Vercel premium feel.
Never replace functional JSX logic, only alter presentation strings.
